name: Tracklution
description: Server-side tracking and conversion attribution platform with first-party cookies and Conversion API support.

seo.title: Tracklution — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Tracklution: Server-side tracking and conversion attribution platform with first-party cookies and Conversion API support.

when_to_use: Server-side Conversion API tracking for Meta and Google
First-party cookie attribution to recover lost post-iOS14 signals
Cookieless conversion tracking for privacy-first ad campaigns

pros: First-party cookies plus Conversion API support
Quick setup with common marketing stacks
Reasonable pricing for SMB and mid-market
cons: Web-focused, not a mobile app MMP
Smaller brand versus Stape or Segment
Less useful for pure in-app UA
review.verdict: Handy server-side tracker for web conversions, but miscategorized as mobile attribution.
review.best_for: DTC and SMB web advertisers wanting first-party, server-side tracking to Meta and Google.
review.not_for: Mobile app teams needing SKAN, install attribution and partner postbacks.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence

lock_in.reason: Server-side tracking with custom setup; exportable data

developer_experience.reason: CAPI and first-party tracking with decent docs
